grant_title: More than $9.4 Million in Grants Awarded for Hands-on Health Care in Georgia
geographic_restrictions: Primarily serves underserved communities across the state of Georgia, including rural and urban areas (e.g., Atlanta, Waycross, Rome, Brunswick, Athens, Valdosta).
project_area: Hands-on health care services, including medical and dental clinics, mobile clinics, pregnancy centers, and nursing education programs.
demographic_requirements: Primarily serves underserved communities, including rural and urban patients, with a focus on providing access to quality health care.
eligibility_summary: Open to clinics, faith-based health care providers, and nonprofits providing hands-on health care services in Georgia, with a preference for those serving underserved communities.
